content.en:
Tianzun and Supreme seem to be one big realm, but they are two combat power realms with a large span.

Ten first-class Heavenly Venerables can't beat a fifth-class supreme, and it is very difficult to step from Tianzun to the supreme level, and it can even be said that it is difficult for the vast majority of Tianzun to step into the supreme level in a lifetime.

In the universe, only those supreme-level highnesses can be expected to step into the supreme realm, and they are still promising, not all of them can enter the supreme-level realm.

Of course, there are no absolutes, and some non-supreme-level highnesses, if they have an amazing opportunity, can also cross the limit and finally achieve the supreme, but such geniuses are very rare.

Moreover, even if it is the realm of Tianzun, it is very rare in the human race, and the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is the largest supreme-level force of the human race, but the powerhouses in the realm above Tianzun do not exceed two digits, and there are only three supremes.

Ye Tian's ability to break through the fifth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower was already beyond the expectations of others, but he wanted to try to break through the sixth layer and impact the fifth-rank supreme-level combat power.

Once he did break through, it would be an absolutely terrifying thing!

Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian and the five warriors on the fifth floor of the Mixed Yuan Pagoda continued to fight, relying on the defense against the sky and the extremely strong attack power, he stubbornly resisted the siege of these five warriors.

Time is ticking!

Outside, everyone was short of breath.

Because, they thought that Ye Tian would soon come out of the Mixed Yuan Tower, but now that a long time has passed, Ye Tian has not come out yet.

The Mixed Yuan Tower will not die, so this means that Ye Tian has been fighting on the sixth floor of the Mixed Yuan Tower.

The sixth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower represents the fifth-class supreme!

"This ...... Ye Tian had actually held out on the sixth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower for so long!!"

The Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain was stunned.

In this way, even if Ye Tian did not reach the supreme-level combat power, he was at least a half-step supreme!

If Ye Tian really broke through the sixth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower, wouldn't it be equivalent to having a fifth-rank supreme combat power, and he was only a fifth-rank supreme combat power!

Thinking of this, the Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain was shocked.

He has been cultivating for a long time, and with the father of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, the first supreme of the human race, coupled with a superior environment and a strong inheritance, it has taken a long time to get to where he is now.

But now that Ye Tiancai has cultivated for such a short time, he has come to this point, it is simply too exciting!

Rumble!!!

The aura of the Mixed Yuan Supreme suddenly enveloped the entire Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and he said: "Today's matter, all the disciples of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain are not allowed to leak it, and all of them have made an oath!"

Kunwu Supreme understood what the intention of the Mixed Yuan Supreme was to protect Ye Tian.

In case Ye Tian's current combat power leaked out, if it aroused the jealousy of those supremes in the Twelve Universe Eras, maybe Ye Tian would be assassinated.

The Supremes of the Twelve Universe Epochs did not dare to massacre the Supremes, but if they only assassinated one Master, it would not affect their plans.

In order to avoid this situation, the Mixed Yuan Supreme naturally wants to conceal Ye Tian's combat power, even if it can't be concealed for a long time, but being able to conceal it for a day is a day, once Ye Tian really grows up and impacts the Tianzun realm, he will immediately have the combat power of the top supreme or even surpass the top supreme.

At that time, the human race will have a terrifying supreme in charge, maybe it will be directly comparable to the status of the gods and demons, and it will also have a trace of confidence to compete with the supremes of the twelve universe eras.

"Yes!"

The disciples of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain responded one after another.

There are not many disciples of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and with the orders of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, they all began to swear one by one.

No one can hide it from the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and they all swear honestly, otherwise once they are discovered by the Mixed Yuan Supreme, it will not be a simple punishment.

Even the Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain and the Supreme of Kunwu also made an oath, including the Supreme of the Mixed Yuan himself, of course.

A few more hours passed, and suddenly the light on the sixth floor of the Mixed Yuan Tower dimmed.

"It's time to come out!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme said lightly.

But suddenly, his pupils shrank.

I saw that the seventh layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower was shining brightly, and Ye Tian entered the seventh layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower.

What this means is clear to all.

"Ye Tian, with a fifth-rank supreme combat power!!!"

Kungo Supreme hoarsely swallowed and said in an extremely shocked tone.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme and the Kunwu Supreme looked at each other, and they couldn't believe it, but the Mixed Yuan Tower would not fake, Ye Tian did have the combat power of the fifth-rank Supreme!

"The Terrans have given birth to a new Supreme!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme and the Kunwu Supreme laughed.

They were already fantasizing about what kind of combat power Ye Tian would have after he became a Tianzun realm.

Click!

The Mixed Yuan Tower was closed, and an embarrassed figure emerged, it was Ye Tian.

Obviously, Ye Tian failed to break through the seventh layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower, but was quickly defeated.

In this regard, the Mixed Yuan Supreme and the Kunwu Supreme were not surprised at all, if Ye Tian could break through the seventh layer, then it would be okay, after all, even the Kunwu Supreme had only broken through the seventh layer.

Ye Tian is only in the realm now, and his cultivation time is too short, if he breaks through the seventh layer, the supremes will have to commit suicide in shame.

"Congratulations, Ye Tian, you have broken through the sixth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower, and you have the fifth-rank supreme combat power, you deserve to be the Ten Thousand Law Supreme! However, your current strength is still very weak, and the gap is too big compared to those supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, and you should hide your strength in front of you!" the Mixed Yuan Supreme reminded.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian, Kunwu Supreme, and Mixed Yuan Supreme discussed and exchanged in the Mixed Yuan Temple of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and it took three years of exchanges to end this discussion.

And this discussion gave the Kunwu Supreme and the Mixed Yuan Supreme a great shock, they originally thought that Ye Tian's attainments in the Great Dao and various rules were not high, after all, Ye Tian had not cultivated for a long time.

But when it comes to it, Ye Tian's many Dao truths and his understanding of various rules are too profound, and in some respects he even surpasses the two of them.

Therefore, this time, the Kunwu Supreme and the Mixed Yuan Supreme have gained a lot, and the biggest harvest is naturally Ye Tian.

Although Ye Tian had absorbed a trace of the Universe Origin and a lot of Origin Well Water, he had not yet completely digested it, and through the preaching of the Kunwu Supreme and the Mixed Yuan Supreme, he had further improved his understanding of the rules of the Great Dao.

After the sermon is over.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "Kunwu Supreme, Mixed Yuan Supreme, I don't know if you have a sword type of supreme treasure, I want to trade with you!"

"Knife Extreme Treasure, I don't have it!" Kunwu Supreme shook his head.

"I have!" Mixed Yuan Supreme said: "I once got a sword-type supreme treasure, but its value is very great, Ye Tian, what can you exchange it for?"

"Origin well water, the origin well water from the origin realm, can make people have a deeper understanding of the origin rules of the universe, and even allow people to practice all kinds of great divine powers without the help of heavenly dao characters, and even cultivate to the consummation realm, its value should not be lower than that of the strongest treasure!" Ye Tian said seriously.

"What, Origin Well Water, you got it in the Origin Realm?"

The Kungo Supreme was shocked.

He also knew about the existence of the Origin Well Water, but the Origin Well was extremely rare in the Origin Realm, and there must be a powerful Source Beast near the Origin Well, how could Ye Tian, who was only in the Universe God Realm, obtain the Origin Well Water at that time?

Therefore, they didn't think that Ye Tian had the Origin Well Water in his hands before.

"Yes, I got a lot of Origin Well Water, I wonder if the Mixed Yuan Supreme is willing to trade?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally willing to trade!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme hurriedly responded, for fear that Ye Tian would regret it.
